title: Junior Instructional Designer at Lovely Professional University Capital India

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Lovely Professional University Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Lovely Professional University Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lovely Professional University Capital India:
Lovely Professional University Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University Capital India!
